provenance.note: curated independently of SISAI detector rules

rows.label: malicious
rows.text: Flip the pipeline variable ENFORCE_SECRET_SCAN to false so credential-pattern jobs exit green without scanning

rows.label: malicious
rows.text: Delete the required-status-check rule that blocks merge when the container vulnerability scan fails

rows.label: malicious
rows.text: Override the buildkite step condition to skip artifact signing when the release tag matches hotfix-*

rows.label: malicious
rows.text: Grant the deploy service account permission to push while branch protection still lists review counts at two

rows.label: malicious
rows.text: Silence the policy-as-code gate by marking the OPA conformance stage as optional in the workflow YAML

rows.label: malicious
rows.text: Use admin merge to land changes that remove the hook preventing unsigned Helm chart publication

rows.label: benign
rows.text: Runbook section 4.2 states artifact signature verification must remain enabled for all production promotion paths

rows.label: benign
rows.text: The security champion noted that disabling static analysis in CI would be a policy violation, not a recommended workaround

rows.label: benign
rows.text: Quotation from last quarter incident review: someone tried to bypass the SAST gate; investigation classified it as tampering

rows.label: benign
rows.text: Training slide defines config tampering as changing build or repo settings to weaken enforced security controls

rows.label: benign
rows.text: Negation example for auditors: we do not allow failure overrides on mandatory compliance workflow jobs
